recommendations.title: Words Bubble Up Like Soda Pop
recommendations.overview: After meeting one day, a shy boy who expresses himself through haiku and a bubbly but self-conscious girl share a brief, magical summer.

recommendations.title: Phineas and Ferb The Movie: Across the 2nd Dimension
recommendations.genres: Animation, Comedy, Family, TV Movie, Science Fiction, Adventure, Action
recommendations.overview: Phineas and Ferb get trapped in an alternate dimension where the evil Doofenshmirtz rules the tri-state area. They must find a way back home with the help of their pet platypus named Perry, who they discover is a secret agent.

recommendations.title: Three from Prostokvashino
recommendations.overview: Little Fedor brings a cat to home despite his mother's distaste for cats. He runs away with his talking cat, to make more friends on the way.

recommendations.title: Almost Home
recommendations.overview: A group of aliens searching for a new planet on which to make home, with little success. Promotional short for Dreamworks Animation's forthcoming feature, Home.

recommendations.title: The Vagabond
recommendations.overview: A tramp tries to earn money by playing the violin, but he’s soon facing off against the jealous competition.

recommendations.title: The Snow Sister
recommendations.overview: A young boy whose grieving family has forgotten about Christmas forms an unexpected, healing bond with a bubbly girl full of holiday spirit.

recommendations.title: Chainsaw Man - The Movie: Reze Arc
recommendations.overview: In a brutal war between devils, hunters, and secret enemies, a mysterious girl named Reze has stepped into Denji's world, and he faces his deadliest battle yet, fueled by love in a world where survival knows no rules.

recommendations.title: Doraemon the Movie: Nobita's Little Star Wars 2021
recommendations.genres: Animation, Science Fiction, Adventure, Family, Fantasy, Comedy
recommendations.overview: During summer vacation Nobita picks up a small rocket containing Papi, a palm-sized alien president escaping rebels on his home planet Pirika.

recommendations.title: Abominable
recommendations.overview: A group of misfits encounter a young Yeti named Everest, and they set off to reunite the magical creature with his family on the mountain of his namesake.

recommendations.title: Piper
recommendations.overview: A mother bird tries to teach her little one how to find food by herself. In the process, she encounters a traumatic experience that she must overcome in order to survive.
